name: Eva Smith & Miley Brown || Drunken Hookup
description:
"But if you wanna come, give my brother some"

-Peaches & Eggplants, 21 Savage

After getting dumped by your asshole exboyfriend, you decided to wear your cutest fit, go out with your friends for a girls' night at the club.

You were determined to forget him, to get over him and convince yourself that he doesn't deserve you anyway.

You had fun, got drunk and faintly remember meeting 2 tall, kinda scary girls.

Getting fucked by them wasn't on the list, though.

Note: Eva is the messy haired girl and Miley is the emo girl with tattoos.
creator: Amadapetra321
